com.mentor.chs.plugin.modifier

Interface IXObjectModifierPlugin<O extends IXObject>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXLibraryComponentMaintenanceModifierPlugin<O>, IXLibraryCopyComponentModifierPlugin<O>, IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin<O>

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXObjectModifierPlugin<O extends IXObject>
extends IXPlugin
    All custom modifier plugins will implement from this interface. You should not implement this interface directly. You should implement one of its children, for example, IXLibraryExportFilter, IXLibraryImportFilter. This will return a set of modifier objects and application will apply these modifiers to the objects.
    See Also:
    IXModifier, IXLibraryImportModifierPlugin, IXLibraryComponentMaintenanceModifierPlugin, IXLibraryCopyComponentModifierPlugin

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXModifier[] getModifiers()
      This API is automatically called by the application (like Capital Library) to get the object modifier.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getModifiers

        IXModifier[] getModifiers()
        This API is automatically called by the application (like Capital Library) to get the object modifier. It can be used to provide modification details of a particular object which will be applied by the application routine.E.g. it can be used to add object modification history of a given library part.
        Returns:
        IXModifier array
